response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and spoken dialogue phonetically matched the reference context, although the reference JSON mistakenly named Usada Pekora instead of Inugami Korone. 
2. JSON Usage: Fully corrected the performer names (Inugami Korone and Sakura Miko) based on the visual feed (#戌神ころね5周年 hashtag and character designs) and manually transcribed/translated the entire talk segment and 'PANTS' song.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all spoken lines and musical phrases precisely to the milliseconds, handling rapid turn-taking and quick song rhythms perfectly.

subtitles.original: チーム友達
subtitles.english: Team Friends!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！イェイイェイイェイイェイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah!

subtitles.original: かっけえ！かっけえことじゃねえ？イェーイ！
subtitles.english: So cool! Isn't this super cool? Yeah!

subtitles.original: 見てんのか、ご、ご、見てんのかよ！
subtitles.english: Are you watching? Wh-who... are you watching?!

subtitles.original: おい！柄が悪いぜおい！
subtitles.english: Hey! We've got bad attitudes, hey!

subtitles.original: ちょっと、あの...ちょっとね、ちょっとね、
subtitles.english: Wait, a little... Just a bit, just a bit,

subtitles.original: この帽子のせいとかでね、ちょっとヤカラっぽくなっちゃうけどね。
subtitles.english: Because of these caps, we look a bit like delinquents, but...

subtitles.original: うん、かっこいいじゃん！でもこういう格好いつかしてみたかったんだよ！
subtitles.english: Yeah, but it's cool! I've always wanted to dress like this some day!

subtitles.original: 今ね、これバチクソ高いからこれ気をつけて。
subtitles.english: Right now, this is insanely expensive, so be careful with it.

subtitles.original: え、本当に？
subtitles.english: Eh, really?

subtitles.original: 本当にね、今日ね、来たらね、これ用意してあるんでって言われて、「えっ？！こ、これ、何これ？」って。
subtitles.english: Seriously, when I arrived today, they said "We have this prepared for you." I was like, "Eh?! Wh-what is this?!"

subtitles.original: 重たいでしょ？
subtitles.english: It's heavy, right?

subtitles.original: うん、重たい。でもかっこいい。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's heavy. But it's cool.

subtitles.original: あの、ロックリーみたいになってるから今、うちら。
subtitles.english: We're like Rock Lee right now, with these weights on.

subtitles.original: ロックリーｗｗ　重りつけてるからね、今。
subtitles.english: Rock Lee lol, because we're wearing weights right now.

subtitles.original: 重りつけてるからね、今。
subtitles.english: Because we're wearing weights right now.

subtitles.original: 解き放たれたらもっと動けるね。
subtitles.english: If we take them off, we'll be able to move even more.

subtitles.original: そう、そう、外したらね。いい感じになりますけど。
subtitles.english: Right, right, once we take them off. We'll be in great shape.

subtitles.original: え、でも、ころね、5周年おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: But anyway, Korone, congratulations on your 5th anniversary!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ありがとう！5周年なんだよ、ころね。
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! It's Korone's 5th anniversary.

subtitles.original: ね、すごい、早いよね。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's amazing how fast it is, right?

subtitles.original: すごいよね、早い！
subtitles.english: It really is fast!

subtitles.original: え、待って、みこちゃんの衣装見て？これ誕生日で...
subtitles.english: Wait, look at Miko-chan's outfit? Is this the one from your birthday...

subtitles.original: はい！履いたやつね。可愛い！
subtitles.english: Yes! The one I wore. So cute!

subtitles.original: え、後ろも見せて、後ろも。
subtitles.english: Oh, show us the back too, the back.

subtitles.original: ちょっとあの、今回用意してくれたこの装飾に...
subtitles.english: It kinda matches the decorations they prepared for us this time...

subtitles.original: なんかマッチしてて、お揃いなんですけど。
subtitles.english: They somehow match and look like a set.

subtitles.original: めっちゃマッチしてます。
subtitles.english: They really match so well.

subtitles.original: え、でもそれで言うとさ、ころね、この衣装さ...
subtitles.english: Oh, but speaking of which, Korone, this outfit...

subtitles.original: ゲマズのイベントのやつじゃない？これ。
subtitles.english: Isn't this from the Gamers event?

subtitles.original: そうそう、超、超、超ゲマズの。
subtitles.english: Right, right, the Cho Cho Cho Gamers...

subtitles.original: 衣装！可愛いじゃん！
subtitles.english: Outfit! It's so cute!

subtitles.original: みこちゃん、今日、これが初お披露目なんだ、この衣装の。
subtitles.english: Miko-chan, today is actually the first time debuting this outfit.

subtitles.original: え？！これ？！
subtitles.english: Eh?! This?!

subtitles.original: これで、これで、チーム友達でちょっと初...
subtitles.english: With this, with this "Team Tomodachi", it's kinda the first...

subtitles.original: 初お披露目、初お披露目しちゃったんですけど。
subtitles.english: First reveal, we did the first reveal like this?

subtitles.original: え、でも、いいじゃん、いいじゃん、可愛い。
subtitles.english: But it's fine, it's fine, it's cute.

subtitles.original: ちょっと、ちょっと短くない？なんかエッチじゃない？ちょっと。
subtitles.english: Isn't it a bit short, though? Isn't it kinda sexy? A little.

subtitles.original: これめっちゃ短いんだよね、大丈夫？
subtitles.english: This is super short, is it okay?

subtitles.original: 丸見えじゃん。こら！見せるんじゃないよ！
subtitles.english: It's totally visible. Hey! Don't show it!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫かな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if it's okay?

subtitles.original: しかもね、ころね、なんかさ、めっちゃ胸がパツパツって言われてて、これ。
subtitles.english: And also, they told me my chest is super tight in this.

subtitles.original: いや、なんか、ちょっとシワができてるの、パツパツで。はち切れそうだよ、なんか。
subtitles.english: Yeah, there's like, some wrinkles forming because it's so tight. It looks like it's going to burst.

subtitles.original: すごいよね、これね。たぶんサイズが合ってないんだと思う。
subtitles.english: It's crazy, right? I think the size probably doesn't fit.

subtitles.original: あー、でもそれぐらいがね、いいですからね。え、え、写真撮ろう、写真。
subtitles.english: Ah, but that amount is, you know, actually good. Let's take a picture, a picture!

subtitles.original: 写真撮りたい！ちょっとアップめで撮りたいな。
subtitles.english: I want to take a picture! I want to take a close-up one.

subtitles.original: いいよ、いいよ、うん。じゃ、しゃがもう、しゃがむか。
subtitles.english: Sure, sure, yeah. Let's squat down then.

subtitles.original: しゃがむか。
subtitles.english: Let's squat.

subtitles.original: ヨウ！
subtitles.english: Yo!

subtitles.original: ヨウ！ヨウ！あ、いいじゃん！
subtitles.english: Yo! Yo! Ah, looks good!

subtitles.original: ヨウ、ヨウ！スパイダーマンみたいになっちゃった。
subtitles.english: Yo, yo! I ended up looking like Spider-Man.

subtitles.original: ヨウ、ヨウ！え、サングラスもさ、取ってさ、撮ろうよ。
subtitles.english: Yo, yo! Hey, let's take off the sunglasses too for a photo.

subtitles.original: あ、そうだね。よいしょ、よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Oh, right. Up we go, up we go.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待ってね、みんなね。よいしょ。いくよ！
subtitles.english: Wait a moment, everyone. Up we go. Here we go!

subtitles.original: せーの！はい！
subtitles.english: One, two... Yes!

subtitles.original: あ、いい！もう一枚、もう一枚、もう一枚。
subtitles.english: Ah, nice! One more, one more, one more.

subtitles.original: え、アップめで撮る？アップめで撮りたい、イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Should we take it close-up? I want to take it close-up, yay!

subtitles.original: あ、じゃちょっとカメラをいただきましてね。あ、どう？イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Ah, let me grab the camera then. How is it? Yay!

subtitles.original: ヨウ！撮れてる？
subtitles.english: Yo! Is it taking?

subtitles.original: チーム友達。チーム友達。
subtitles.english: Team Tomodachi. Team Tomodachi.

subtitles.original: 俺たち何？チーム友達。
subtitles.english: What are we? Team Tomodachi.

subtitles.original: どこ歌ってんねんｗｗ
subtitles.english: Where are you singing from? lol

subtitles.original: え、でもさ、この曲さ、選んでくれたの嬉しかったよ。
subtitles.english: But still, I was really happy you chose this song.

subtitles.original: やっぱり、チーム友達っていうぐらいの歌だから、友達と歌いたくて。だから誰でもよかったんだけど、別に。友達だからみんな。
subtitles.english: After all, since it's a song literally called "Team Tomodachi", I wanted to sing it with a friend. So honestly, anyone would've been fine, since everyone is a friend.

subtitles.original: おい！おい！
subtitles.english: Hey! Hey!

subtitles.original: 嘘、嘘ｗｗ　特に！特にみこみこと歌いたかった！
subtitles.english: Kidding, kidding lol. Especially! I especially wanted to sing with Mikomiko!

subtitles.original: あー、ありがとう。じゃ、チーム友達だからね、当たり前か。
subtitles.english: Ah, thank you. Well, we are "Team Tomodachi", so I guess that's only natural.

subtitles.original: チーム友達、イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Team Tomodachi, yay!

subtitles.original: え、でも、そろそろ次の曲なんじゃないですか？
subtitles.english: But anyway, isn't it about time for the next song?

subtitles.original: あ、そう、もうちょっとね、もうちょっとだけ続くのよ、なんだけど...
subtitles.english: Ah, right, it's going to continue just a little bit longer, but...

subtitles.original: え、次、どんな感じなの？
subtitles.english: Oh, what's the next one like?

subtitles.original: え、次はね、あの、パンツですね。
subtitles.english: Well, next is... "Pants".

subtitles.original: え？パンツ。
subtitles.english: Eh? Pants.

subtitles.original: パンツ？
subtitles.english: Pants?

subtitles.original: 恥ずかしい、やめて、撮らないで、撮らないで。
subtitles.english: It's embarrassing, stop, don't film me, don't film me.

subtitles.original: 待って、待って、パンツって、この履いてるパンツってこと？
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, by "pants", do you mean the underwear we're wearing?

subtitles.original: え、みこさん履いてないの？パンツ。
subtitles.english: Wait, Miko-san, are you not wearing pants?

subtitles.original: 安心してください、履いてますよ。
subtitles.english: Don't worry, I'm wearing them!

subtitles.original: 履いてる？あ、よかった、じゃあ。
subtitles.english: You are wearing them? Oh, thank goodness then.

subtitles.original: え、ころねはまだこれからなのよ、パンツ。
subtitles.english: But for Korone, the "Pants" is yet to come.

subtitles.original: え、え、履いてないってこと？これから？
subtitles.english: Wait, so you're not wearing any right now? Coming up next?

subtitles.original: これから。ごめん、みこみこ、これからだから、ころね、パンツ。
subtitles.english: Coming up next. Sorry Mikomiko, but it's coming up next for me, "Pants".

subtitles.original: え、パ、パンツ？！
subtitles.english: Wait, p-pants?!
